description: session-register with a pre-existing row + same session_key preserves the auth_token and emits one 'registered:' line. No channel pairing (PEER_INBOX_PENDING_DIR is empty), no auth_token print (preserved). Deterministic because no fresh token is minted.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode, auth_token, auth_token_rotated_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', 'existing-key', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive', 'preserved-token-XXXXX', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z');
